title: Deleting and Renaming Files
description: Remove files and change their names.

slides.title: Deleting Files
unlink Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$file = 'temp.txt';
if (file_exists($file)) {
    if (unlink($file)) {
        echo "$file deleted.";
    } else {
        echo "Could not delete $file.";
    }
} else {
    echo "$file does not exist.";
}
?>

slides.title: Renaming Files
slides.content:
# rename() – Move or Rename

`rename(string $oldname, string $newname): bool` renames or moves a file or directory.

```php
rename('old.txt', 'new.txt');
```

If the new name is in a different directory, the file is moved.

```php
rename('file.txt', 'backup/file.txt'); // moves to backup/ folder
```

slides.title: rename Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$old = 'data.csv';
$new = 'archive/data_backup.csv';
if (rename($old, $new)) {
    echo "File moved/renamed successfully.";
} else {
    echo "Rename failed.";
}
?>

quizData.question: Which function is used to delete a file?
quizData.explanation: unlink() deletes files. rmdir() removes directories.
